explanation: The property states that globally (G), if the system enters the SelfTest Mode (bool_exp2), then it is guaranteed that eventually (F) all self-test steps will pass successfully and the local alarms test will also pass (bool_exp3). This captures the requirement that the self-test procedure 'ensures' functionality and alarm operation by requiring successful completion of these tests in the future once the self-test mode is active.

The property states that globally, whenever the system is in 'SelfTestMode', it must be the case that all self-test steps have passed successfully ('selfTestPass') AND the local alarms test has passed successfully ('testAlarmsPass'). This ensures that the self-test procedure, when active, guarantees the full functionality of the system, its accessories, and the alarms.

The property states that whenever the system is in 'SelfTestMode', it will eventually lead to a state where all self-test steps pass successfully AND the local alarms test passes successfully. This captures the intent that the self-test procedure, when active, ensures the system's full functionality and working alarms.

The property states that globally, whenever the self-test steps pass successfully (selfTestPass), it must be true that the local alarms test also passes (testAlarmsPass). This captures the requirement that the self-test procedure ensures the alarms work. The phrase "the system and its accessories are fully functional" is considered implicitly covered by the meaning of "selfTestPass", as a successful self-test typically indicates overall system functionality.

The property states that the system's self-test procedure, indicated by entering 'SelfTestMode', must eventually lead to a state where both 'selfTestPass' (all self-test steps passing successfully, implying system functionality) and 'testAlarmsPass' (local alarms test passing successfully) are true. This captures the requirement that the self-test procedure ensures the system and its accessories are fully functional and the alarms work.

This captures the requirement that the self-test procedure ensures the system and its accessories are fully functional and the alarms work.

This directly captures the requirement that the self-test procedure ensures the system and its accessories are fully functional and the alarms work.

This captures the requirement that the self-test procedure, when active, ensures full system functionality and working alarms.
